title: Rubroshorea acuminata
uses: Rubroshorea acuminata is a species that is often used in traditional medicine. Its medicinal uses include treating fever, cough, and other respiratory issues due to its antipyretic and expectorant properties. The plant's leaves and bark are also used to treat various health conditions, including diarrhea and skin infections. Additionally, Rubroshorea acuminata is used in the treatment of rheumatism and other inflammatory conditions. Further research is needed to fully understand the plant's potential health benefits and confirm its medicinal uses.

Additionally, some studies suggest that Rubroshorea acuminata may have antimicrobial and antiviral properties, helping to protect against infections. However, it's essential to note that the available information on its therapeutic properties is limited and more studies are required for confirmation.
